'''Hera Tuix''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Hera Tuix received her early [[Jedi training/Legends|education]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]]. Selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] after the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Tuix was made a [[Jedi Commander|commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="YDR" />

Stationed at the Temple in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Tuix participated in the [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|Apprentice Tournament]] overseen by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ilena Xan]]. Making it through to the Round of Eight, which was held in one of the Temple [[Jedi Temple refectory/Legends|refectories]], Tuix was defeated by a wrist-lock performed by fellow apprentice [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]].<ref name="YDR" />

==Appearances==
